title: lophodium collinum
intro: Lophodium collinum, also known as the "Rabbit's Foot Fern", is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lophodium collinum include its ability to reduce swelling, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves and stems of the fern.
